context: Tests whether the device-integrity skill gives source-grounded App Attest attestation verification guidance.

checklist.name: Attestation nonce composition
checklist.description: Computes `clientDataHash = SHA256(challenge)` and verifies the certificate nonce against `SHA256(authData || clientDataHash)`, not `SHA256(challenge)` alone.

checklist.name: Credential certificate extension
checklist.description: Names OID `1.2.840.113635.100.8.2` as the credential certificate extension containing the nonce value to compare.

checklist.name: App and key binding
checklist.description: Verifies App ID/RP ID hash, environment `aaguid`, initial counter, `credentialId`, and keyId/public-key hash binding.

checklist.name: Server challenge handling
checklist.description: Treats the challenge as server-issued, one-time, unexpired, and consumed only after successful verification.

checklist.name: Persisted state
checklist.description: Stores the verified public key and receipt for assertion and fraud-risk use instead of treating the raw attestation object as the trusted durable record.
